description: Repaired source<->artifact reconciliation composition per the reduced-meta-extrapolation + source-independence correction: config is admitted before source construction, the full 40-layer source class is enumerated directly (no reduced extrapolation), and counts come from the admitted config. Aggregate-only.

corrections_applied.config_independently_admitted: config.json admitted via its immutable git blob identity (== Hub blob_id) + the full frozen text-architecture conjunction + the GPTQ conjunction, BEFORE any source construction; the admitted config supplies the authoritative expert/layer counts
corrections_applied.no_config_mutation: the admitted config object is not mutated in place; the source class is built from admitted configuration
corrections_applied.full_direct_enumeration: the complete 40-layer text-only class is constructed directly on the meta device (measured feasible: full construction ~0.7s, 693 modules == the prior reduced+extrapolated result) and enumerated directly; the reduced+extrapolation path is removed
corrections_applied.incomplete_enumeration_guard: the composition fails closed unless the source enumeration covers every layer index 0..num_layers-1

remaining_order.item_3_load_manifest_semantics: exact tensor/quant-aux/dtype/shape/multiplicity/ordering/fusion + numbered->packed loader transformation, zero ignored/missing/synthesized under strict loading
remaining_order.item_4_full_identity_binding: equality-bind the exact Transformers package, source file, source digest, class qualname, configuration class, and model-construction dispatch against a frozen expected pin (observed identity is currently recorded, not yet equality-bound)
remaining_order.item_7_resource_transition: independently authorized + verified dual-3090 transition (unrelated tenant currently present and active)
remaining_order.item_8_parity: exact quantized forward + VJP/JVP parity before fitting

privacy: aggregate-only; counts and booleans, no module names, tensor values, weights, caches, or local paths
